zh.Millau, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France: 法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫米耀奧
zh.Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France: 法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez於1112年出生在法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲時，他的父親Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez27歲，母親vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls22歲。他於1144年與Agnes d' Auvergne在法國奧維結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1208年在法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫米耀奧享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez于1112年出生在法国米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲时，他的父亲Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez27岁，母亲vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls22岁。他于1144年与Agnes d' Auvergne在法国奧維结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1208年在法国米迪-列內斯艾維倫米耀奧享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Rodez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Roden in High Ercall (Shropshire). The place takes its name from the river Roden, itself probably named in Celtic as ‘swift river, rushing river’ (British Rutunā).

variants.name: Rodine
meanings: Americanized form, under French influence, of Russian and Jewish   Rodin  .

variants.name: Redding
meanings: English: habitational name from Reading, the county seat of Berkshire, from Old English Rēadingas ‘people of Rēad(a)’, a byname meaning ‘red’.

Irish: from Ó Rodáin ‘descendant of Rodán’, a personal name derived from a diminutive of rod ‘strong, lively, spirited’. Anglicized forms with other vowels, as in Rudden, Reddan, may be derived from a variant Ó Roidín. Current Anglicized Irish forms usually have a double d.
German: patronymic from any of the ancient Germanic personal names with the first element rād ‘counsel, advice’.

variants.name: Rodin
meanings: From Greek: short form of Hērodion ‘devotee of Hera’. The name Herodion was borne by a kinsman of St Paul mentioned in the New Testament (Romans 16:11); according to post-biblical tradition he became bishop of Patras and met a martyr's death.

variants.name: Rhoden
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named (Hesse, Saxony-Anhalt, Silesia).

variants.name: Roaden
meanings: Altered form of Irish or German   Roden  .

en.lifeSummary: When Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez was born in 1112, in Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez, was 27 and his mother, vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls, was 22. He married Agnes d' Auvergne in 1144, in Auvergne, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1208, in Millau, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez est né en 1112, à Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez, avait 27 ans et sa mère, vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes d' Auvergne en 1144, à Auvergne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1208, à Millau, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez 1112 in Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez 27 und seine Mutter vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls 22. Er hat 1144 in Auvergne, Frankreich Agnes d' Auvergne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1208 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Millau, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez è nato il nel 1112 nel Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Agnes d' Auvergne nel 1144, nel Auvergne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1208, nel Millau, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodezが1112年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスエイビーロンロデズで生まれた時，父Comte Hughes I or II de Rodezは27歳，母vicomtesse Emengarde de Creysslsは22歳であった。1144年にフランスアウバーグンでAgnes d' Auvergneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1208年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスエイビーロンミラウで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez(이)가 1112년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 에비런 로데즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1144년 프랑스 오버그니에서 Agnes d' Auvergne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1208년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 에비런 미로에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez nasceu em 1112, em Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes d' Auvergne em 1144, em Auvergne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1208, em Millau, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez родился в 1112 г. в местности родез, авирон, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes d' Auvergne в 1144 г. в местности аувиргн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1208 г. в местности миллау, авирон, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte de Rodez, Benavent, Millau, Lodeve Hughes II de Rodez nació en 1112, en Rodez, Aveyron, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Comte Hughes I or II de Rodez, tenía 27 años y su mamá, vicomtesse Emengarde de Creyssls, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Agnes d' Auvergne en 1144, en Auvergne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1208, en Millau, Aveyron, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 96 años.
